atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inline existing utility classes into a custom rule.

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Import another stylesheet for reference-only access to theme values, utilities, and variants.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Define design tokens that Tailwind exposes as theme variables and utilities.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Add extra source paths for Tailwind class detection.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Register a custom utility so Tailwind can treat it like a first-class utility class.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Apply a variant to a block of styles.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Assign styles to Tailwind's base, components, or utilities layer.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Load a Tailwind configuration file for compatibility with config-based setups.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Load a Tailwind plugin from CSS for compatibility with plugin-based setups.

atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Insert Tailwind's generated base, components, or utilities output in config-based setups.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Apply styles at a configured breakpoint in legacy Tailwind syntax.
